title: Automation to move a board from workspace to workspace
excerpt: Please can there be an automation feature that once an ‘item has changed’ you can move a board into another workspace. This is needed in order to automate archiving once boards are no longer needed but shouldn’t be delet…

posts.author: bethmace2024 (BETH STARKE)
posts.cookedHtml: Please can there be an automation feature that once an ‘item has changed’ you can move a board into another workspace. This is needed in order to automate archiving once boards are no longer needed but shouldn’t be deleted.
